plugin.name: Network Port Scanner
plugin.description: Scan a host for open TCP ports and save a plain-text report to the default output path.
title: Network Port Scanner
description: Enter a host and a port list such as `80,443,8080` or `1-1024`. The scan runs in the background and writes a report under your configured output path.
host.label: Target Host
ports.label: Ports
timeout.label: Timeout
summary.done: Scanned {count} ports on {host} and found {open} open ports.
summary.no_open: Scanned {count} ports on {host} with no open ports.
report.heading: Open ports:
dialog.missing.title: Missing Input
dialog.missing.body: Enter a host and at least one port.
dialog.invalid_timeout.title: Invalid Timeout
dialog.invalid_timeout.body: Timeout must be a numeric value in seconds.
